overview: A modern, premium College Election voting website with smooth animations, sidebar navigation, and a royal navy-black-white gradient design.
features: Full-screen hero slideshow with fade transitions and parallax scrolling
8 election positions in a responsive grid
Left-side sliding sidebar for position navigation
6-7 candidate cards per position with single-select voting
Progress indicator (Step X/8) and final submit button
Glassmorphism design with royal navy, black, and white gradients
Smooth hover animations and auto-advance after each vote
Fully responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop
